title: Hornet Removal in Amityville, Long Island | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Amityville, Long Island. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Amityville homes and businesses.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services throughout Amityville, Long Island, protecting your home or business from aggressive hornet colonies. Our certified technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from residential properties, commercial buildings, and outdoor structures across the Amityville area. With competitive pricing between $350-$550, we deliver fast, effective solutions to keep your property safe.
whyUs: As Amityville's trusted pest control provider, we combine over 15 years of Long Island experience with advanced hornet removal techniques and safety protocols. Our local technicians understand the unique pest challenges faced by Amityville residents and respond quickly to emergency hornet situations, often providing same-day service to protect your family and pets.
localContext: Amityville's mix of historic Victorian homes, waterfront properties along the Great South Bay, and tree-lined neighborhoods create ideal nesting conditions for hornets in eaves, attics, and mature trees. From properties near Amityville Village to homes surrounding the Amityville River and Ireland Park, our team knows exactly where hornets nest and how to safely remove them without damage to your property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Amityville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout Amityville, typically arriving within 2-4 hours of your call during business hours. Our technicians carry professional-grade equipment to safely eliminate hornet nests on the first visit, ensuring your property is secure as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. Pricing depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height. We provide upfront quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my family and pets in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during all hornet removal jobs in Amityville. Our technicians are fully licensed and trained in safe application methods. We advise keeping pets and children indoors during treatment, and the treated area is typically safe within 2-4 hours after completion.

faqs.question: Do you handle hornets in hard-to-reach places like tall trees or high eaves?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our Amityville team is equipped with extension poles, ladders, and specialized safety equipment to reach hornet nests in tall trees, second-story eaves, attics, and other challenging locations. We safely remove nests up to 30 feet high and ensure complete elimination regardless of nest location on your property.
